brand.name: Dosti Dil Se
brand.description: An NGO focused on helping students with educational essentials, nature projects, and assisting anyone in need.

buttons.primary: bg-[#5A8896] text-white hover:bg-[#46707C] px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md font-medium text-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#5A8896] text-[#5A8896] hover:bg-[#5A8896] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 font-medium text-lg

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-[#EBE7E0] hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#EBE7E0]/50

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Asymmetrical split or overlapping bento. Generous white space. Large emotive typography.
sections.components: Text block with 'Spreading Love & Hope', Logo prominently displayed but elegantly integrated, Primary Donate CTA, background subtle natural texture or clean solid.

sections.name: Founder Story
sections.layout: Text-heavy but highly readable. Wide margins (e.g., max-w-3xl).
sections.components: Tribute to Krishna Mahajan and his grandparents. Use Playfair Display italic for a pull quote.

sections.name: Our Mission & What We Do
sections.components: Cards mapping to: Education (Stationary/Bags), Nature Projects, Helping Anyone in Need. Use imagery.

sections.name: Impact Gallery & Stats
sections.layout: Grid masonry or simple staggered grid.
sections.components: Large numbers for stats (Students Helped, Donations, Projects). Image gallery showing kids and planting trees.

sections.name: Donate Section
sections.layout: Clean card layout centered on the screen.
sections.components: Tiers: ₹500, ₹1000, ₹2500, Custom Input. Razorpay button styling.

sections.name: Contact & Footer
sections.components: Contact form (Name, Email, Message), Email: connect@dostidilse.org, Footer links.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Subtle fade-ups for text blocks on scroll (Framer Motion). Hover states must clearly change color and lift slightly. Images use slow scale-up on hover if inside cards.
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure Playfair Display and Manrope are legible with sufficient contrast. Use semantic HTML. All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing layouts rather than Shadcn cards, allowing for overlapping elements and soft bento grids.
Shadcn UI can be used for the Contact Form and Donation selection logic, heavily customized to remove the 'SaaS' look.
Inject the provided Logo URL wherever the brand logo is needed.
Use Phosphor Icons (Thin or Light weight) or Lucide icons for a delicate, minimalist touch.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all buttons, form inputs, and major links.
Build the Razorpay donation flow logic and contact form handler.
